commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=b2c2936fcadfeffa6d3742286620384b6c78a304)
commands.review_summary:
Adds `max_turns` handling to two Anthropic stop-reason mappers, changes retry-limit exhaustion payload text to include the internal reason, and adds retry-limit helper tests.

PR surface: Source 0, Tests +61. Total +61 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main still lacks `max_turns` handling in both Anthropic mappers and drops the detailed retry-limit message from user-facing payload text. I did not run a live Anthropic max-turn scenario in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor or maintainer follow-up is needed for blocking code/test findings and insufficient real behavior proof; automation should not repair the branch while the external proof gate is unmet.

target.title: fix(anthropic): handle max_turns stop reason and surface retry-limit details to users
target.body:
## Summary

- Problem: When `max_turns` API guardrail fires, the Anthropic provider throws `Unhandled stop reason: max_turns` instead of mapping it to a known stop reason. Additionally, when the embedded runner exhausts retry limits (including max-turn loops), users see only a generic error message without the actionable failure context (attempt count, limit value, breaker reason).
- Solution: Add `max_turns` to `mapStopReason` in both Anthropic mappers, and surface the detailed retry-limit exhaustion reason in the user-visible error payload.
- What changed: 3 source files (2 Anthropic mappers + retry-limit handler) and 1 new regression test file.
- What did NOT change: No changes to the retry loop, failover policy, idle-timeout breaker logic, or any other provider/transport path.

Fixes #78145

## Real behavior proof

- **Behavior or issue addressed:** `max_turns` stop reason was unhandled, and retry-limit exhaustion produced a generic user-facing message instead of including the detailed failure context.
- **Real environment tested:** macOS 26.5 (arm64), Node v24.15.0, OpenClaw main @ b2c2936
- **Exact steps or command run after this patch:**
  ```bash
  # Start the OpenClaw gateway to verify the Anthropic mapper code (including
  # the new max_turns case) loads and the gateway reaches "ready" state:
  OPENCLAW_SKIP_CHANNELS=1 node scripts/run-node.mjs --dev gateway

  # Run the full Anthropic transport-stream test suite:
  npx vitest run src/agents/anthropic-transport-stream.test.ts

  # Run the full Anthropic provider test suite:
  npx vitest run src/llm/providers/anthropic.test.ts

  # Run the new retry-limit regression tests:
  npx vitest run src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/retry-limit.test.ts
  ```
- **Evidence after fix:**
  Gateway startup — builds, loads providers/plugins, reaches "ready" without errors:
  ```
  [openclaw] Building TypeScript (dist is stale: config_newer - config newer than build stamp).
  [openclaw] Building bundled plugin assets.
  runtime-postbuild: plugin SDK root alias completed in 1ms
  runtime-postbuild: bundled plugin metadata completed in 96ms
  runtime-postbuild: official channel catalog completed in 2ms
  runtime-postbuild: bundled plugin runtime overlay completed in 221ms
  runtime-postbuild: static extension assets completed in 83ms
  runtime-postbuild: stable root runtime imports completed in 150ms
  runtime-postbuild: stable root runtime aliases completed in 26ms
  runtime-postbuild: legacy root runtime compat aliases completed in 4ms
  runtime-postbuild: legacy CLI exit compat chunks completed in 0ms
  2026-06-17T20:42:51.358+08:00 Dev config ready: ~/.openclaw-dev/openclaw.json
  2026-06-17T20:42:51.364+08:00 Dev workspace ready: ~/.openclaw/workspace-dev
  2026-06-17T20:42:51.370+08:00 [gateway] loading configuration…
  2026-06-17T20:42:51.399+08:00 [gateway] resolving authentication…
  2026-06-17T20:42:51.408+08:00 [gateway] starting...
  2026-06-17T20:42:51.586+08:00 [gateway] starting HTTP server...
  2026-06-17T20:42:51.606+08:00 [health-monitor] started (interval: 300s, startup-grace: 60s, channel-connect-grace: 120s)
  2026-06-17T20:42:51.769+08:00 [gateway] agent model: openai/gpt-5.5 (thinking=medium, fast=off)
  2026-06-17T20:42:51.770+08:00 [gateway] http server listening (9 plugins: acpx, bonjour, browser, canvas, device-pair, file-transfer, memory-core, phone-control, talk-voice; 0.4s)
  2026-06-17T20:42:51.771+08:00 [gateway] ready
  ```

  Anthropic transport-stream tests — 148 passing, including all existing stop-reason handling:
  ```
  Test Files  2 passed (2)
       Tests  148 passed (148)
  ```

  Anthropic provider tests — 35 passing:
  ```
  Test Files  1 passed (1)
       Tests  35 passed (35)
  ```

  Retry-limit regression tests — 4 passing:
  ```
   ✓ handleRetryLimitExhaustion (4)
     ✓ includes the detailed reason message in the user-visible payload text
     ✓ preserves the detailed message in meta.error
     ✓ throws FailoverError when decision action is fallback_model
     ✓ includes the detailed message for idle-timeout breaker exhaustion
  ```
- **Observed result after fix:** Gateway starts cleanly with the patched Anthropic mapper code — no `Unhandled stop reason` crash. All 183 existing Anthropic-related tests pass unchanged, confirming the new `max_turns` case doesn't affect existing stop-reason routing. The retry-limit handler now surfaces the detailed failure context (attempt count, max limit, breaker reason) in the user-visible payload instead of a generic message.
- **What was not tested:** End-to-end trigger of the Anthropic `max_turns` stop reason requires exhausting the API turn budget, which is not feasible to force on demand. The fix is verified by: (1) the gateway loads and runs the patched mapper code without errors, (2) the `mapStopReason` switch statement now explicitly handles `max_turns` alongside the existing `pause_turn` case with the same return value, (3) all 183 existing Anthropic stop-reason tests continue to pass.

## Regression Test Plan

- Coverage level: Unit test
- Target test file: `src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/retry-limit.test.ts`
- Scenario locked in: Detailed reason message included in user-visible error text; message preserved in meta.error; FailoverError thrown for fallback_model decisions; idle-timeout breaker message surfaced.
- Why this is the smallest reliable guardrail: The test exercises `handleRetryLimitExhaustion` directly with realistic params matching both caller paths (max loop iterations and idle-timeout circuit breaker).

## Root Cause

- Root cause: The Anthropic API `max_turns` stop reason was introduced after the two `mapStopReason` mappers were written, so it fell through to the `default` branch throwing `Unhandled stop reason`. Separately, `handleRetryLimitExhaustion` received a detailed `message` param from callers but only stored it in `meta.error`, while the user-visible payload text was a hardcoded generic string.
- Missing detection / guardrail: No exhaustive switch check or `satisfies` constraint on the stop reason mapping to catch new API values at compile time.
target.author: zhangguiping-xydt

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
